meta.title: Azure Managed Services - Azure
meta.description: Streamline your Azure cloud with Folio3’s Azure Managed Services expert monitoring, VM & backup management, security, and advisory support to maximize ROI and uptime.

items.text: Seamless Azure Management For Worry-Free Cloud.
Whether you're a small business owner or a large enterprise, Azure managed service is the perfect solution for simplifying your cloud management & maximizing your productivity.

items.text: Here’s what we have got in the Azure managed services store for you
Mitigate operational and security risks with Azure managed services. You can rest easy knowing that your cloud environment is being monitored, maintained, and optimized by a team of experts.
Swift Issue Resolution and Continuous Availability. Minimize downtime and ensure uninterrupted operations with Azure Managed Services’ responsive support services.
Proactive Insights for Optimal Performance. Stay ahead of potential issues and maximize efficiency with AMS's comprehensive service monitoring.
Seamlessly Scale and Optimize your VM Infrastructure. Leverage AMS for efficient provisioning, monitoring, and maintenance of virtual machines.
Reliable Data Protection and Recovery. Ensure data resilience and simplify backup processes with AMS reliable backup management solutions.
Minimize downtime and accelerate recovery in the event of a disaster with AMS comprehensive disaster recovery management.

Expert advisory solutions help you optimize your cloud infrastructure and maximize ROI with monthly service reports and cloud strategy advisory services. Gain valuable insights, improve your cloud operations, and align your strategies with business objectives.
AMS offer monthly service reports, providing you with comprehensive visibility into their cloud infrastructure performance and usage.
AMS conduct quarterly architecture reviews, evaluating the cloud infrastructure against industry best practices and identifying improvements.
AMS provide strategic guidance and advisory services to help you define and implement cloud strategies.

items.text: Advanced support solutions ensure the optimal security of your applications and infrastructure. Enhance your operational efficiency with features such as application performance monitoring and advanced security monitoring (SIEM).
AMS provide application performance monitoring solutions, offering real-time insights into the performance and availability of your applications.
AMS offer advanced security monitoring solutions through Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) capabilities.
AMS include endpoint protection powered by SentinelOne, delivering advanced threat detection and response capabilities.

AMS provides a compliant cloud environment that is constantly updated to protect your business data. With features such as threat detection and Azure Security Center, your organization can benefit from enhanced security measures with ease.
AMS offer robust identity and access management solutions that provides centralized control and management of user access to resources.
Azure Network security solutions, such as virtual private networks (VPNs) and firewalls help secure your business's network infrastructure.
AMS offer advanced data protection and encryption capabilities, including Azure Information Protection, that help businesses safeguard sensitive data.

items.text: Work With Top Microsoft CSP Experts

Folio3 is a proud Direct (Tier 1) Microsoft Cloud Solution Provider (CSP) offering a comprehensive suite of cloud and business applications licensing solutions, value-added services, and unparalleled support to businesses of all sizes.

Microsoft offers flexible pricing and licensing options for Microsoft 365, Microsoft Dynamics 365, Microsoft Azure, and Microsoft Power Platform, to suit your business requirements. Contact us to explore the affordable licensing plans, including user-based models, team member licensing, and additional add-ons that can enhance the functionality of your existing business solutions.

items.text: Who Can Benefit from Azure Data Managed Services?
Optimize Your Existing Microsoft Azure Environment With Us

Businesses in the e-commerce and retail sector can leverage Azure Managed Services to analyze customer behavior, optimize inventory management, personalize marketing campaigns, and gain insights into sales trends.

Azure Managed services can organizations in the healthcare sector to drive innovation, improve their health related services, and enhance their customer experience by providing them with advanced analytics.

Banks, insurance companies, and other financial institutions can utilize Azure Managed Services to perform risk analysis, detect fraudulent activities, conduct compliance monitoring, and make data-driven investment decisions.

Manufacturers can utilize Azure Managed Services to optimize production processes, analyze supply chain efficiency, predict equipment failures, and improve overall operational efficiency to bolster business growth.
Marketing agencies and advertisers can utilize Azure Managed Services to analyze customer demographics, track campaign performance, optimize marketing strategies, and measure return on investment.

items.text: We believe in the power of the cloud to transform businesses and empower people.

Azure Managed Services work by providing businesses with a range of cloud-based services that are designed to help manage and maintain their IT infrastructure. These services are managed by a team of experts who oversee the deployment, management, and optimization of the services.
There are several reasons why you may need Azure Managed Services for your business:

Reduced IT Costs: Azure Managed Services can help reduce your IT costs by allowing you to access enterprise-level technology without the need for costly investments in IT infrastructure and personnel.

Increased Agility: Azure Managed Services can help increase your business agility by allowing you to quickly deploy and scale your IT infrastructure as your business needs change. This can help you stay ahead of the competition and adapt to changing market conditions.

Enhanced Security and Compliance: Azure Managed Services offer advanced security and compliance capabilities, which can help protect your business from cybersecurity threats and meet regulatory requirements. This can help you avoid costly data breaches.

Improved Reliability and Performance: Azure Managed Services offer redundancy and failover capabilities across different regions, which can help ensure high availability and disaster recovery. This can help you avoid costly downtime and maintain business continuity.
Access to Advanced Technology and Expertise: Azure Managed Services offer access to advanced technology and expertise, which can help you stay up-to-date with the latest IT trends and technologies.

Azure provides a range of services, including virtual machines, databases, and web applications, which can be managed and scaled on demand. With Azure, organizations can focus on developing and delivering applications, while leaving the underlying infrastructure management to Microsoft.

Folio3’s Azure Managed Services offering encompasses holistic support including Azure service monitoring, virtual machine management, backup and disaster recovery, security management (e.g. SIEM, endpoint protection), application performance monitoring, and expert advisory and cloud strategy services such as monthly service reports and quarterly architecture reviews.

They implement advanced security measures such as Azure Security Center, identity and access management, network security (firewalls, VPN), and data protection/encryption (e.g. Azure Information Protection), plus endpoint protection via SentinelOne for robust threat detection and response.

Folio3 provides strategic guidance including detailed monthly service reports, quarterly architecture reviews, and tailored cloud strategy advisory services to optimize cloud infrastructure, enhance ROI, and align IT operations with business objectives.
